creator: dokas@oitsec.umn.edu
text:
Due to some change in a port related to Moose (I think it was the recent update
of devel/p5-Class-MOP) has caused some cascading issues that surfaced in a Catalyst
application:

  Can't locate Moose/Autobox.pm in @INC (@INC contains: /home/dokas/stuff/src/App/script/../lib /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.9/BSDPAN /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9 /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.9/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.9 .) at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/Catalyst/Model/DBIC/Schema.pm line 14.
  BEGIN failed--compilation aborted at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/Catalyst/Model/DBIC/Schema.pm line 14.
  Compilation failed in require at (eval 441) line 3.
          ...propagated at /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.9/base.pm line 93.
  BEGIN failed--compilation aborted at /home/dokas/stuff/src/App/script/../lib/App/Model/App.pm line 4.
  Compilation failed in require at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9/Catalyst/Utils.pm line 280.
  Compilation failed in require at ./script/roach_server.pl line 66.


Obviously Moose::Autobox is not installed and there is no corresponging port

Fix: 

Build ports for Moose::Autobox and it's dependencies.
How-To-Repeat: 
Build and attempt to run a simple Catalyst application that uses DBIx::Class as a Model.
